articles.title: Langrisser: Sea of Sword first gameplay trailer, details, and screenshots - Gematsu
articles.description: BlackJack Studio has released the first gameplay trailer, information, and screenshots for the newly announced “next-generation fantasy tactical RPG” Langrisser: Sea of Sword.

articles.title: LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps - Krebs on Security
articles.description: The home appliance giant LG Electronics USA said this week it plans to suspend any apps built for its smart TVs that turn one's television into an always-on residential proxy node. The move comes less than a month after researchers…

articles.title: Claude Code brings live iOS app testing into its Mac app - 9to5Mac
articles.description: Claude Code’s Mac app now lets users test iOS apps in an interactive simulator pane, provided they have Xcode with the iOS platform installed.

articles.title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market - CNBC
articles.description: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.

articles.title: 35 Times Old People Posted Things On The Internet So Wildly Inappropriate That I May Genuinely Never Be The Same Again - buzzfeed.com
Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 specs and pricing leak in full ahead of launch - Android Authority
articles.description: A fresh leak purports to reveal the full specs sheet of the Galaxy Watch 9 and Watch Ultra 2, as well as likely European pricing.

articles.title: Apple's $634M payment to Masimo now set in stone after Judge tosses appeal - AppleInsider
articles.description: The Masimo trial ultimately failed to get a permanent ban on Apple Watch sales or use of the blood oxygen sensor, but the final verdict will have Apple pay $634M to Masimo's new owner Danaher after the appeal was rejected.

articles.title: Google Teases Gemini 4 Release - Droid Life
Apple raises prices on some streaming services as licensing costs climb - Fox Business
articles.description: Apple Music individual plans rise to $11.99 and family plans jump to $19.99 as the company cites rising licensing costs for the subscription hikes.

articles.title: Xbox VP Leaves Just 3 Months After Joining Asha Sharma's Team - Kotaku
articles.description: Jared Palmer had joined Xbox from Microsoft's CoreAI division

articles.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app - TechCrunch
articles.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotif…

articles.title: Nintendo says users voluntarily paid higher prices, have no right to tariff refunds - Ars Technica
articles.description: Nintendo says Switch buyers got what they paid for, urges court to dismiss lawsuit.

articles.title: PS5's New Commercial Goes All-In on Marvel - Push Square
Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads - The Verge
articles.description: Apple is planning to launch a new Apple Upgrade program for leasing iPhones, iPads, Mac, and Apple Watches, while discontinuing the current iPhone Upgrade Program.

articles.title: Critical wp2shell WordPress flaws exploited to install webshells - BleepingComputer
articles.description: Hackers are exploiting the "wp2shell" critical vulnerability suite (CVE-2026-63030 and CVE-2026-60137) affecting WordPress Core to deploy persistent webshells and install malicious plugins on affected servers.

articles.title: Darkest Dungeon is getting its first dollop of DLC in several years, as the gloomy old RPG celebrates its 10th birthday - Eurogamer.net
articles.description: Red Hook Studios has surprised fans of the first Darkest Dungeon with a new DLC pack that will add two heroes from the sequel and more.

articles.title: Meet a Devious Pixie Who’ll Trade Treasures for Teeth in This Brand New the Blood of Dawnwalker Quest Gameplay - IGN
articles.description: Check out some brand new quest gameplay from The Blood of Dawnwalker, featuring a devious pixie who's obsessed with teeth.
